fields.name: record_id
fields.description: Stable unique identifier for one binding measurement record.

fields.name: source_id
fields.description: Identifier linking to an entry in specs/source_map.json.

fields.name: catalyst_band_gap_ev
fields.description: Band gap of the photocatalyst in eV.

fields.name: catalyst_surface_area_m2g
fields.description: Specific surface area of the photocatalyst in m2/g.

fields.name: catalyst_particle_size_nm
fields.description: Particle size / diameter of the photocatalyst in nm.

fields.name: dye_name
fields.description: Standardized preferred name of the organic dye pollutant.

fields.name: dye_pubchem_cid
fields.description: PubChem Compound ID (CID) of the dye.

fields.name: initial_dye_concentration_value
fields.description: Initial concentration of the dye pollutant.

fields.name: initial_dye_concentration_unit
fields.description: Unit of the initial dye concentration (standardized to mg/L).

fields.name: catalyst_dosage_value
fields.description: Photocatalyst dosage or concentration in the reaction mixture.

fields.name: catalyst_dosage_unit
fields.description: Unit of the catalyst dosage (standardized to g/L).

fields.name: light_type
fields.description: Type of light source used for irradiation.

fields.name: irradiation_time_unit
fields.description: Unit of irradiation time (standardized to min).

fields.name: extraction_confidence
fields.description: Confidence in extracted values: high, medium, low, or unknown.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Free-text notes, caveats, or provenance details.
